text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint town buried deep among snowdrifts, there lived a shy girl named Lily. She loved listening to tales of grand adventures told by her grandfather on snowy evenings. Watching him weave those stories always made her feel like she could fly.

One winter, an unusual event happened. A huge snowball battle commenced! People brought their finest sleds, and kids fashioned monster balls. Lily decided hers was ornate. She picked cotton candy snowy hair. With mighty swings, she rolled it out towards the tallest tower. That didn't survive long.

Then came Snowmia. She was huge, white, and cheerful. Lily imagined her dodging. With desperate flair, Lily threw. Snowmia vanished in a puff of powder. Lily jumped. Around her flew petals.

Days turned to weeks. She visited the castle where Snowmia lived. She asked quaint questions. Snowmia explained tales of springs where gardens bloom forever.
